data.body: PASS 1 review (T3 Integration feasibility): PASS / not-applicable. The plan does not assert any new, unverified external capability. The Jira REST endpoints it relies on are already in production use in this codebase (e.g. `POST /rest/api/3/search/jql` with `fields=["issuelinks"]` and `GET /rest/api/3/issue/{key}?fields=issuelinks` in `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/acli_graph.py`), and live auth/HTTPS preconditions (JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_API_TOKEN) are already established by the existing external suite (`tests/external/test_link_sync_roundtrip_live.py`). The plan's strategy is deliberately *hermetic* (fixtures captured from real Jira, served through an in-process fake), with full live-sandbox e2e and cross-team Pact explicitly out of scope — so it adds no new live external dependency. No findings.
